meaning: n.莫霍克族,莫霍克语,溜冰之一种花式
examples: There is no sign of an end to the standoff between Mohawk Indians and the Quebec provincial police.
He goes to the hairdresser and he gets a Mohawk that's huge and it's orange.
The sides were short but when we touched the actual mohawk there were these bumps on either side of his neck at the nottom of his head.
But here in Mohawk, even the victims' friends said their stance on gun rights remained firm.
The shootings rattled Herkimer and neighboring Mohawk, villages about 170 miles northwest of New York City.
